## Debt description

What is the issue and where (file:line / project)?

## Standard involved

<!-- Which docs/standards/*.md does this relate to? -->

- [ ] Async/await
- [ ] Naming
- [ ] Exception handling
- [ ] Configuration
- [ ] Logging
- [ ] Correlation IDs
- [ ] Package governance
- [ ] Architecture (layering / SOLID / CQRS / DI)
- [ ] Security
- [ ] Performance

## Impact

Risk, maintainability, performance, or security impact.

## Proposed remediation

Which enforcer skill or workflow applies? Estimated effort (S / M / L)?

## Priority

- [ ] Now
- [ ] Next
- [ ] Later
